retry_reason: Failure indicates the object is being freed or already gone; the pointer will eventually become NULL, so retrying the function is futile.
contract_summary: RCU-protected conditional get-wrapper: acquires a reference on the aa_profile pointed to by *p using kref_get_unless_zero under rcu_read_lock. Returns the profile pointer with an elevated refcount on success, or NULL on failure (object dying or absent). The caller must check the return value and must ultimately release the acquired reference via aa_put_profile (or similar). The RCU lock is only held during the get operation; the returned pointer is safe to use without further RCU protection due to the acquired reference.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to acquire an RCU-protected reference to an aa_profile by incrementing its refcount conditionally. No other business logic exists.

check.reason: kref_get_unless_zero(&c->label.count) increments the refcount on the returned profile c. The access path from c through label.count (kref) to refcount.refs (atomic_t) matches the callee information and the code. Location 'return' index 0 is correct because c is the return value.
